title: DemonsHeart Raid Drop Balance
description: a simple datapack which balance the drops from raid mobs
body:
This datapack makes Illagers (Vindicators, Evokers and Pillagers) drop far less emeralds, as now their emerald drops aren't affected by looting at all, and the chance of dropping emeralds has decreased. They can drop 1 Emerald at best. The drop rate for Totems of Undying has been altered to be 0.1% (1 in 1000) or at best 0.4% (1 in 250) with looting 3, this is to increase the rarity and value of Totems of Undying. Witches no longer drop sticks or gunpowder, now they drop more glowstone and redstone dust. They also have a new chance of dropping 0 to 1 splash potions: Harming, Slowness, Speed and Poison (1-4%) Healing (3-6%) If you would like to help support me or thank me for making this pack, you can do so at my Ko-fi page! https://ko-fi.com/heartbreaker69 Enjoy!
Support


Made by [DemonsHeart](https://ko-fi.com/heartbreaker69)
